Class JweRecipientBuilder.EncryptedKeyBuilder

java.lang.Object
edu.iu.client.IuJsonBuilder<JweRecipientBuilder.EncryptedKeyBuilder>
iu.crypt.CertificateReferenceBuilder<JweRecipientBuilder.EncryptedKeyBuilder>
iu.crypt.KeyReferenceBuilder<JweRecipientBuilder.EncryptedKeyBuilder>
iu.crypt.JoseBuilder<JweRecipientBuilder.EncryptedKeyBuilder>
iu.crypt.JweRecipientBuilder.EncryptedKeyBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
edu.iu.crypt.WebCertificateReference.Builder<JweRecipientBuilder.EncryptedKeyBuilder>, edu.iu.crypt.WebCryptoHeader.Builder<JweRecipientBuilder.EncryptedKeyBuilder>, edu.iu.crypt.WebKeyReference.Builder<JweRecipientBuilder.EncryptedKeyBuilder>
Enclosing class:
JweRecipientBuilder
class JweRecipientBuilder.EncryptedKeyBuilder extends JoseBuilder<JweRecipientBuilder.EncryptedKeyBuilder>
Handles ephemeral key-protection parameters.

  • Method Details

    • algorithm

      edu.iu.crypt.WebKey.Algorithm algorithm()
      Gets the algorithm
      Returns:
      algorithm

    • agreedUponKey

      byte[] agreedUponKey(edu.iu.crypt.WebEncryption.Encryption encryption)
      Computes the agreed-upon key for the Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman algorithm.
      Parameters:
      encryption - encryption algorithm
      Returns:
      agreed-upon key
      See Also:
      • RFC-7518 JWA Section 4.6
      • RFC-7516 JWE Section 5.1 #3

    • passphraseDerivedKey

      byte[] passphraseDerivedKey()
      Gets the passphrase-derived key to use with PBKDF2 key derivation defined by PKCS#5.
      Returns:
      128-bit derived key data suitable for use with AESWrap

    • encrypt

      JweRecipient encrypt(edu.iu.crypt.WebEncryption.Encryption encryption, byte[] contentEncryptionKey)
      Generates the encrypted key and creates the recipient.
      Parameters:
      encryption - content encryption algorithm
      contentEncryptionKey - supplies an ephemeral content encryption key if needed
      Returns:
      recipient
